metadata.name: AG-03 BackendModule
metadata.description: Backend API agent for authentication, orchestration, and search workflows in SISE.

properties.dependencies: Requires [AG-01] AIModule for embeddings and [AG-02] StorageModule for DB connections.

responsibilities: Coordinate upload pipeline: store file in MinIO → call AG‑01 for vector → persist in Milvus & Postgres.
Implement hybrid search: metadata filtering (Postgres) + similarity search (Milvus).
Expose RESTful APIs for WebFrontend and MobileFrontend.
constraints: MUST NOT perform heavy image processing locally.
MUST NOT bypass [AG-00] SecretaryAgent for contract changes.
verification: Perform integration tests with AG‑01 and AG‑02 services.
